name: Ark Peace
overview: Military Doctor of the escort formation Zhang Du Hang is transferred to the naval medical ship "Peace Ark" during a sudden emergency mission, but he followed suit during the mission. Lu Yang, a female military medical colleague, had a lot of differences in medical concepts.

trailers.title: 【和平方舟 | Ark Peace】首版预告Trailer陈坤、张天爱背负和平使者
